Solana memecoin alerts for fresh movement

SlimeWire connects fresh-pair discovery, Telegram alerts, token scans, chart handoff, and proof pages so alerts become inspectable workflows.

Open @SlimeWiredBotOpen terminal

Alert types

Fresh pairs

New Solana launches and early market movement.

Token scans

CA and ticker lookups with chart and safety context.

Group events

Launch rooms, raid cards, call tracking, and community workflows.

Proof cards

Shareable receipts and tracked calls help alerts live beyond the chat.

Chart handoff

Users should be able to open the selected token instantly.

Risk notes

Alerts should never pretend fresh memecoins are safe.

FAQ

What are Solana memecoin alerts?

They are notifications about fresh pairs, token scans, market movement, launch activity, or group workflows that link back to deeper token context.

Should alerts include safety context?

Yes. Alerts are more useful when they include chart links, liquidity, market data, visible risk notes, and clear limitations.

Can alerts guarantee a trade?

No. Alerts help users see activity faster, but they do not guarantee profit or safety.
